status_override.reason: Massachusetts Design Corp. (#468) rebranded to Julian Woods in 2025. HubSpot has them on a single Company record now labeled 'Julian Woods(formerly Massachusetts Design)' (HubSpot company ID 46167759542, originally 8474228273 — remapped on company merge). Same primary contact (Will Gascoigne); active CSM relationship — 64-minute meeting Dec 19 2025, $750 deal closed Apr 2026. Our Allmoxy customer record #468 still carries the old 'Massachusetts Design Corp.' name and shows as churned because the rebrand didn't update our records. No separate Julian Woods record exists in customer_profiles yet — when one is created, link it as the canonical via parent_allmoxy_customer_id. Until then, marking #468 as duplicate_of (orphaned canonical) so it falls out of churn counts.

status_override.reason: Ultra Craftsmanship (#428) is the same business as Ultrashelf (#322) — a pre-rebrand record. Both have payment history (#428 paid through Jun 2023 with $31K lifetime; #322 took over and paid through Oct 2023 with $3.25K lifetime). Without dedup, this single business inflates the churned-logo count by 1. With this override, Ultra Craftsmanship mirrors Ultrashelf's churned status, MRR is zeroed (no double-count of historical churn dollars), and excluded_from_logo_count keeps it out of the logo waterfall as a separate entity.

status_override.parent_customer_name: Modern Fronts DBA - Wildwood Cabinets Incorporated
status_override.reason: Wildwood Cabinets, Inc. (#308) is the same business as Modern Fronts DBA - Wildwood Cabinets Incorporated (#457) — a pre-rebrand record. #308 paid through Feb 2022 (lifetime $7K, 21 txns) before the rebrand; #457 took over with the new DBA name and is currently active (lifetime $21K, 122 txns, $419/mo MRR). Without dedup, this single business would show up as both a 2022 churn AND an active customer. With this override, #308 mirrors #457's active status, MRR is zeroed, and excluded_from_logo_count keeps it out of the logo waterfall.

status_override.reason: Tree Products (treeproductsawi.allmoxy.com) is a secondary Allmoxy instance billed under the AWI parent (#323) $199/mo subscription, not a standalone payer. Their own Stripe activity stopped Jan 2024 when the billing consolidated under the parent; instance remains live as part of the parent agreement. Counting them as churned would mis-state retention; counting their MRR as $100/mo would double-count. Resolution: status=active, MRR=$0 (parent already carries the dollars).
